_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Suite 7, 88 Lorrikin Parade, Harrow Bay NSW 2949
Ms. Tamsin O’Reath (DOB 06/11/1988, CFO, residing at Suite 7, 88 Lorrikin Parade, Harrow Bay NSW 2949)
Proposed strategic investment and partial acquisition in Quenda Robotics Limited (BGX-listed) by Coromandel Infrastructure Holdings Pty Ltd
no announcement until Completion other than where required by law
Term Sheet — Proposed strategic investment and partial acquisition in Quenda Robotics Limited (BGX-listed) by Coromandel Infrastructure Holdings Pty Ltd, effective 2 June 2026.

Structure: CIH to subscribe for 18% new ordinary shares for A$27.5m and acquire 7% secondary from founders, subject to applicable Australian corporations legislation and BGX Listing Rules administered by the Australian Markets & Listings Authority.

Information rights and confidentiality: Parties acknowledge receipt of non-public, price-sensitive information; disclosure to comply with BGX continuous disclosure standards and AMLA guidance; no announcement until Completion other than where required by law.

Due diligence: CIH may interview up to 10 staff; a 32-year-old engineer located in coastal Victoria will assist with demos without providing personally identifying particulars; cybersecurity review to include device fleet including Rivora Slate models.

Closing mechanics: Completion T+2 business days after CP satisfaction; share transfer recorded by Coast & Ranges Registry Services Pty Ltd; joint announcement drafted in compliance with BGX Market Notices.

Employment, health, and credit checks: CP includes confirmation that no key person is under a current workplace incapacity restricting core duties and no adverse personal credit events that would breach the company’s Key Personnel Policy; this clause is general and not directed at any named individual.
